name: aurora-checkbox
title: Aurora Checkbox & Radio
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Aurora-styled checkbox and radio group built on button[role=checkbox/radio] patterns. 16px control with accent-primary fill, animated check/dot, focus ring glow, and full keyboard support. Includes RadioGroup + RadioGroupItem exports.
docs:
Aurora UI component that installs Aurora Checkbox & Radio.

Install `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`, `aurora-input`, `aurora-radio-group`, `aurora-select`, and `aurora-components` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/checkbox.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`, `aurora-input`, `aurora-radio-group`, `aurora-select`, `aurora-components`.
